subcodes.first_line: O thou child of the Kingdom and firm in the Covenant! Thy letter, through his honor Mirza ..., was received and thy former letters also became acceptable.. In this day the most vital and momentous matter
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @early Christian persecutions; the Pharisees, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
